---
title: "Jean Ingelow"
---

## Jean Ingelow

**Dates:** (1820-1897)

### Description

poet, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1860-1)

### Letters

- Letter from April 3d [1900]
- Letter from May 3d 1888
- Letter from Jan 2d [1885] 
- Letter from June 17th [1869?]
- Letter from March 15th [1866]
- Letter from Feb 21st 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
